textByHash.8140de0b397313d485b4db0a19f32cfa0200b199: What can I interest you in? Need any pipes? I make very sturdy pipes.
textByHash.01f56e733704247d5001f7d7c9bcb73ffd512f25: Why, it's Wemund's Wrench Warehouse. Wemund, that's me.
textByHash.7351c1cbf32ffdfb1db14a84b376806065bfff79: I don't really sell just wrenches, you know, I sell anything related to the maintenance of dwarven steam machines.
textByHash.e5434d88f736d9cdd7e3b7a596591d72aea8569a: Sometimes I do repair work as well. Or I send my assistant.
textByHash.4aab3bce6dd657dea2d31187ce115543828c3104: Oh, he's right over there... used to work in the mines to the south, poor lad. Made a bit of a mess of things I believe.
textByHash.f1b64f3ee042af992dde2f2ee21b713b4bfe94c9: So what'll it be then? Got any ship engines to repair?
